uses: Nonatelia pauciflora has been traditionally used in various parts of the world for its medicinal properties. It is said to have antibacterial and antifungal properties, which can help in the treatment of wounds and skin infections. The plant has also been used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. Its leaves are often used in herbal remedies to boost the immune system and reduce oxidative stress. More research is needed to confirm the effectiveness of Nonatelia pauciflora for medicinal purposes.
